_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: Nf1−/− DNSCs showed a mix of additivity (ZIP score = 7.204, Bliss score = 7.038, Loewe score = 9.075) and synergy (HSA score = 12.69)
resourceName: Nf1-/- dorsal root ganglia neurosphere cells
details: Showed mix of additivity (ZIP score = 7.204, Bliss score = 7.038, Loewe score = 9.075) and synergy (HSA score = 12.69) with abemaciclib and LY3214996 combination
